column2: This photo shows the Eiffel Tower on a morning. I chose this place because it is very famous and I want to visit Paris.
This photo shows the Grand Canyon during sunrise with beautiful colors on the rocks. I chose this place because it looks amazing and I want to visit it one day
This photo shows the Swiss Alps with a snowy mountain, blue lakes, and green valleys. I chose this place because it looks peaceful and very beautiful.
This photo shows the Statue of Liberty on a sunny day with a beautiful view of the city behind it. I chose this place because it is very famous and I want to visit New York one day.
This photo shows beautiful overwater villas in the Maldives during sunset. I chose this place because it looks peaceful and perfect for relaxing
This photo shows Shibuya Crossing at night with many people and bright lights. I chose this place because it looks exciting and full of energy.
This photo shows Oia in Santorini during sunset, with white houses and a beautiful sea view. I chose this place because it looks peaceful and very famous.
This photo shows the Dome of the Rock covered in snow, with people playing outside. I chose this place because it is important and very beautiful, especially in the snow.
This photo shows Tower Bridge in London at night with bright lights. I chose this place because it is a famous landmark and I want to visit London one day.
This image shows Stonehenge covered in snow. I chose this place because it is very old and mysterious, and I would like to see it in real life.
